Registry / Terms / electronic component

electronic component

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00600 · 27 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 18 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

18 distinct definitions across 27 publications. 5 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

5 identical202X2010
smallest physical entity that uses electron or hole conduction in semi-conductors, gases or in a vacuum

13 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
20102007OIML R 107-1:2007T.2.2.301330
[O smallest physical entity that uses electron or hole conduction in semiconductors, gases, or in a vacuum IML D 11: 2004, 3.4]
pending
202X2012OIML R137:20123.5.302699
smallest physical entity in an electronic device used to affect electrons and/or their associated fields in their movement through a medium or vacuum
pending
202X2007OIML R 107-1:2007T.2.2.301330
smallest physical entity that uses electron or hole conduction in semi-conductors, gases or in a vacuum Examples: Electronic tubes, transistors, integrated circuits. [See 3.4 of OIML D 11] [OIML D 11: 2004, 3.4]
pending
20102004OIML D 11:20043.400227
smallest physical entity that uses electron or hole conduction in semi-conductors, gases or in a vacuum. Examples: electronic tubes, transistors, integrated circuits
pending
202X2002OIML R 75-1:20024.1500871
smallest physical entity which uses electron or hole conduction in semi-conductors, gases, or in a vacuum
pending
20102007OIML R 139:2007T.5.302033
smallest physical entity which uses electron or hole conduction in semiconductors, gases, or in a vacuum
pending
20102006OIML R 49-1:20062.5.300459
smallest physical entity which uses electron or hole conduction insemi-conductors, gases, or in a vacuum
pending
202X2006OIML R 51-1:2006T.2.8.300600
smallest physical entity, which uses electron or gap conduction in semi-conductors, or conduction by means of electrons or ions in gases or in a vacuum Examples: Electronic tube, transistor,integrated circuit.
pending
20102006OIML R 137-1:20062.5.401978
smallest physical entity, which uses electron or gap conduction insemi-conductors, or conduction by means of electrons or ions ingases or in a vacuum
pending
202X2006OIML R 76-1:2006T.2.3.300906
the smallest physical entity that uses electron or hole conduction in semiconductors, gases or in a vacuum Examples: Electronic tube, transistor, integrated circuit. [OIML D 11: 2004, 3.4]
pending
20101997OIML R 50-1:1997T.3.3.300494
the smallest physical entity that uses electron or hole conduction insemiconductors, gases or in a vacuum
pending

the smallest physical entity that uses electron or hole conduction insemiconductors, gases, or in a vacuum

the smallest physical entity which uses electron or hole conduction in semi-conductors, gases or in a vacuum
